instructions.name: close_chat
docs: Close a legacy chat account and return rent

accounts.name: config
docs: Protocol-fee config — PDA-derived ([CONFIG_SEED]) so it can't be spoofed; pins `treasury`
to the DAO-rotatable `config.treasury` (replaces the old hardcoded TREASURY_PUBKEY check).

accounts.name: user

accounts.name: user1_profile
docs: First participant's profile — identity = `user1_profile.owner`

accounts.name: user1
docs: The acting signer — must be user1_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — the creator's wallet (main or agent) that covers this tx's fees + rent

accounts.name: post
docs: Body is read-only (its key seeds the comment); the comment_count is on PostStats.

accounts.name: author
docs: The acting signer — must be the commenter_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: name_registry
docs: Community-name registry — `init` makes a duplicate name fail: a second
community claiming the same name (even with a different id) aborts the tx.

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be creator_profile owner OR their registered agent

instructions.name: create_community_post
docs: Create a post inside a community, enforcing the community's posting gate on the WRITE.
Mirrors `create_post` (same Post/PostStats layout, same protocol-fee path) but:
- reads the `community`'s gate and, if set, requires the poster to hold >= `gate_min`
of `gate_mint` in a token account owned by the post's IDENTITY (`profile.owner`,
the funding wallet — never the agent signer). Checked LIVE, so selling the token
removes posting ability on the very next post with no membership change.
- binds the post to the community on-chain by writing `content = "COMM|<id>|<body>"`,
so a holder of one community's token cannot publish into another. This is the same
`COMM|` convention the frontend feed already parses — no read-side change.

accounts.name: post_stats
docs: Companion hot-stats account — created alongside the body, same (author, post_id) seed inputs.

accounts.name: community
docs: The gated community — read-only source of `gate_mint` / `gate_min` / `community_id`.

accounts.name: author
docs: The acting signer — must be the profile owner OR the owner's registered agent.

accounts.name: agent_record
docs: Optional agent record proving `author` is the owner's delegated signer.

accounts.name: gate_token_account
docs: Gate token account — REQUIRED only when `community.gate_mint` is set. Must be owned by
`profile.owner` (the funding wallet, NOT the agent signer) and hold >= `community.gate_min`
of `community.gate_mint`. Read-only (no CPI); Anchor's `TokenAccount` deser already asserts
the account is owned by the SPL Token program. Pass `None` for open communities.

accounts.name: config
docs: Protocol-fee config — REQUIRED + PDA-derived ([CONFIG_SEED]) so it can't be spoofed/omitted.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Fee sink — must equal `config.treasury`, so fees can't be redirected by a crafted tx.

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be the profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: post_stats
docs: Companion hot-stats account — created alongside the body, same (author, post_id) seed inputs.

accounts.name: author
docs: The acting signer — must be the profile owner OR the owner's registered agent

accounts.name: agent_record
docs: Optional agent record proving `author` is the owner's delegated signer

accounts.name: config
docs: Protocol-fee config — REQUIRED + PDA-derived ([CONFIG_SEED]) so it can't be spoofed or
omitted to dodge the fee. Reads the on/off switch + bps rate.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Fee sink — must equal `config.treasury`, so fees can't be redirected by a crafted tx.

accounts.name: username_registry
docs: Username registry — `init` (not `init_if_needed`) makes a duplicate username
fail: claiming an already-taken handle aborts the transaction.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — the creator's wallet (main or agent) that covers this tx's fees + rent

accounts.name: post
docs: The post PDA — seeded by the author's pubkey, so only the real author's post is found

accounts.name: author
docs: The acting signer — must be the author OR the author's registered agent

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be follower_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — the creator's wallet (main or agent) that covers this tx's fees + rent

instructions.name: init_config
docs: One-time bootstrap of the GlobalConfig PDA. Gated to the known deployer key
(TREASURY_PUBKEY) so it can't be front-run between the program upgrade and this call.
Pass the Squads vault as `authority` directly, or pass the deployer and rotate via
`update_config` immediately after. Launches with the fee OFF (DAO flips it on later).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Front-run protection: only the known deployer/treasury key may bootstrap the config.

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be member_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be member_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: config
docs: Protocol-fee config — PDA-derived ([CONFIG_SEED]) so it can't be spoofed; pins `treasury`
to the DAO-rotatable `config.treasury` (replaces the old hardcoded TREASURY_PUBKEY check).

accounts.name: post
docs: Body is read-only here (author + key); the counter is on PostStats — keeping the body
unlocked lets concurrent likes on different posts parallelize.

accounts.name: like_record
docs: One LikeRecord PDA per (post, owner) — init will fail if they've already liked

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be the profile owner OR the owner's registered agent

accounts.name: payer
docs: Treasury pays for like_record rent

instructions.name: migrate_profile
docs: Resize an existing profile account to the current schema size.
This is needed when the Profile struct grows (e.g. adding follower/following counts).

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be the reactor_profile owner OR their registered agent

instructions.name: revoke_agent
docs: Revoke the caller's agent, closing the record and refunding its rent to the owner.

accounts.name: agent_record
docs: Close the agent record and refund rent to the owner.

accounts.name: sender_profile
docs: Sender's profile — identity = `sender_profile.owner`

accounts.name: sender
docs: The acting signer — must be sender_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — the creator's wallet (main or agent) that covers this tx's fees + rent

instructions.name: set_agent
docs: Register (or update) the wallet authorized to sign social actions on behalf of the
caller. Only the profile owner can set their own agent. Re-calling updates the agent.

accounts.name: agent_record
docs: The agent record for the caller's identity — `init_if_needed` so the same owner
can set once and later update. Seeded by `profile.owner`, so only the identity's
own PDA is ever touched.

accounts.name: profile
docs: The caller's profile — PDA seeded by `user`, so `profile.owner == user`.

instructions.name: set_community_gate
docs: Set / clear / adjust a community's posting gate. Creator-only (or their agent).
`gate_mint = None` opens the community; `Some(mint)` requires holding >= `gate_min`
base units of `mint` to post. Takes effect immediately for the NEXT post (the gate is
read live), so lowering/raising the bar or rotating the mint needs no member changes.

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be the community creator OR their registered agent

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be follower_profile owner OR their registered agent

accounts.name: config
docs: Protocol-fee config — PDA-derived ([CONFIG_SEED]) so it can't be spoofed; pins `treasury`
to the DAO-rotatable `config.treasury` (replaces the old hardcoded TREASURY_PUBKEY check).

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be the community creator OR their registered agent

instructions.name: update_config
docs: The DAO lever (authority-only). Partial updates via `Option` so a proposal changes only
what it intends: rotate governance, rotate the fee sink, flip the switch, or adjust the
rate (bounded by MAX_POST_FEE_BPS). `has_one = authority` enforces the Squads vault signs.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The current authority — a Squads multisig vault (or the deployer pre-rotation).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Fee payer — the creator's wallet (main or agent) that covers the realloc rent

accounts.name: user
docs: The acting signer — must be the voter_profile owner OR their registered agent

errors.name: InvalidTreasury
errors.msg: Treasury account does not match config

errors.name: GateTokenRequired
errors.msg: This community requires a gate token to post; none was provided

errors.name: GateTokenMintMismatch
errors.msg: Gate token account mint does not match the community gate

errors.name: GateTokenOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Gate token account is not owned by the poster

errors.name: InsufficientGateBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient gate-token balance to post in this community

types.name: Agent
docs: Maps an identity (funding wallet, `owner`) to its authorized agent (signing
wallet). Presence + match = the agent may sign social actions for `owner`.
Closing it (revoke) removes that authority. One per identity (seeded by owner).

fields.name: gate_mint
docs: Posting gate. `None` = open community (anyone with a profile may post). `Some(mint)` =
only wallets holding >= `gate_min` base units of `mint` may `create_community_post` here.
Checked LIVE on every post against the poster's (owner/funding-wallet) token account.

types.name: CommunityNameRegistry
docs: Reservation account proving a community name is taken (PDA seeded by the name).

types.name: GlobalConfig
docs: Protocol-fee config — the single DAO-owned knob (PDA seeded `[CONFIG_SEED]`, one per program).
`authority` may call `update_config`; `treasury` is the fee sink; `post_fee_enabled` is the
on/off switch; `post_fee_bps` is basis points of BASE_FEE_LAMPORTS. `_reserved` leaves room to
add a future value-bearing fee (e.g. gated-join/subscription %) without a migrate. See
docs/PRD-protocol-fee-switch.md.

types.name: Post
docs: Post BODY (cold). Fixed-width fields FIRST, variable `content` LAST, so author / is_private /
epoch_day / created_at all sit at stable byte offsets the client can `memcmp`-filter and
`dataSlice`-project. Mutable counters moved to `PostStats`. See docs/PRD-post-layout-split-stats.md.
Byte offsets after the 8-byte discriminator:
author 8 · post_id 40 · is_private 48 · epoch_day 49 · created_at 53 · updated_at 61 · content 69(var)

types.name: PostStats
docs: Post STATS (hot). The mutable counters split out of `Post` so the feed can refresh counts via a
cheap `getMultipleAccounts` over ~90-byte accounts (or a full scan) without re-downloading the
500-byte bodies. `reaction_counts` lets the feed render reaction tallies with NO whole-`Reaction`
scan. Seeded `[POST_STATS_SEED, author, post_id]` — same inputs as the body.

types.name: UsernameRegistry
docs: Reservation account proving a username is taken. Its PDA is seeded by the
username itself, so it can exist at most once per handle — that single-init
constraint is what enforces username uniqueness.
